capability: novelty-reserve tracks the recent novelty rate (signal-derived protention)
mechanism: The belief-mass reserved for an as-yet-unseen atom (pNovel, the protention) is the γ-decayed recent NEWCOMER-arrival rate on the field's own mass scale, run through the fixed Born step — not a constant blind to whether newcomers have been arriving.
channel: reserveFig (the figure-field novelty probability the reader holds) and its newcomerBits = -log2(reserveFig)

fixed.matched: reserveFig identical across dense/mid/barren (Δ ≈ 0): the reserve is blind to novelty rate at matched mass — the GAP.
fixed.control: reserveFig differs by mass (barren-short > barren-long): the instrument is alive and mass-sensitive.
fixed.omni: reserveFig identical for dense vs barren at matched mass, in BOTH music and text — the gap is interior, not modality-specific.

signal.matched: reserveFig MONOTONIC in novelty rate: dense > mid > barren (newcomerBits dense < mid < barren). High after newcomers, low after a drought.
signal.control: reserveFig still ordered sanely by mass/drought (not reversed, not collapsed): the fix does not destroy the surface relation, it adds the missing one.
signal.omni: dense > barren reserveFig (newcomerBits dense < barren) in BOTH music AND text — the SAME interior change helps ≥2 senses (the omnimodal gate).

control_logic: The cheap surface signal is prior MASS. The control pair (both barren, different length) is separated by the FIXED reserve already — so a detector that fires only there is reading mass. The matched-mass items hold mass constant; only a novelty-RATE reader separates them. A fix that merely rescaled mass would move the control, not open the matched split.
falsifier: If under signal the matched gradient is NOT monotonic (dense > mid > barren in reserveFig), or the effect appears in only ONE sense, or the fixed path already shows the matched split, the claim is FALSE.
